    <item>
        <guid>nba530528</guid>
        <title>LeBron James: Tallies 19 points in Game 3 defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lebron-james-2344</link>
        <description>James recorded 19 points (7-19 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 3-4 FT), eight assists, six rebounds and one steal over 37 minutes during Saturday's 131-108 loss to the Thunder in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 09 May 2026 8:14:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530526</guid>
        <title>Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: Near double-double in Game 3 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/shai-gilgeous-alexander-4387</link>
        <description>Gilgeous-Alexander logged 23 points (7-20 FG, 3-7 3Pt, 6-7 FT), nine assists, four rebounds, two blocks and one steal over 33 minutes during Saturday's 131-108 win over the Lakers in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 09 May 2026 8:05:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530525</guid>
        <title>Ajay Mitchell: Outstanding in Game 3 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ajay-mitchell-6289</link>
        <description>Mitchell logged 24 points (10-17 FG, 2-4 3Pt, 2-3 FT), 10 assists, four rebounds and three steals over 30 minutes during the Thunder's 131-108 win over the Lakers in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals on Saturday.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 09 May 2026 8:01:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530520</guid>
        <title>Jarred Vanderbilt: Available to play</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jarred-vanderbilt-4458</link>
        <description>Vanderbilt (finger) is available for Saturday's Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals, Mike Trudell of Spectrum SportsNet reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 09 May 2026 3:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530519</guid>
        <title>Jalen Williams: Remaining out for Game 3</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-williams-5687</link>
        <description>The Thunder list Williams (hamstring) out Saturday against the Lakers in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals series.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 09 May 2026 3:22:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
